defs: The act or process of combining or uniting persons and things.
quotes: Making new compounds by new combinations.
A solemn combination shall be made Of our dear souls.

defs: The result of combining or uniting; union of persons or things; esp. a union or alliance of persons or states to effect some purpose; -- usually in a bad sense.
quotes: A combination of the most powerful men in Rome who had conspired my ruin.

defs: The act or process of uniting by chemical affinity, by which substances unite with each other in definite proportions by weight to form distinct compounds.
The different arrangements of a number of objects, as letters, into groups.
notes: ☞ In combinations no regard is paid to the order in which the objects are arranged in each group, while in variations and permutations this order is respected.
